mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_registration WHERE deleted = 0
AND (registration_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR doctor_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT r.id, r.registration_no, r.patient_id, r.patient_name, r.phone, r.gender, r.age, r.department_name, r.doctor_id, r.doctor_name, r.visit_type, r.visit_time, r.status, r.registration_fee, r.diagnosis_fee, r.operator, r.remark, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.deleted, c.order_no AS charge_order_no, c.receivable_amount, c.discount_amount, c.paid_amount, c.pay_method, c.paid_at, c.cashier FROM clinic_registration r LEFT JOIN clinic_charge_order c ON c.id = ( SELECT c2.id FROM clinic_charge_order c2 WHERE c2.deleted = 0 AND c2.registration_id = r.id ORDER BY c2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT id, registration_no, patient_id, patient_name, phone, gender, age, department_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, visit_type, visit_time, status, registration_fee, diagnosis_fee, operator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_registration WHERE registration_no = #{registrationNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_registration (registration_no, patient_id, patient_name, phone, gender, age, department_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, visit_type, visit_time, status, registration_fee, diagnosis_fee, operator, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{registrationNo}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{departmentName}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{visitType}, #{visitTime}, #{status}, #{registrationFee}, #{diagnosisFee}, #{operator}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_registration
registration_no = #{registrationNo}, patient_id = #{patientId}, patient_name = #{patientName}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, department_name = #{departmentName}, doctor_id = #{doctorId}, doctor_name = #{doctorName}, visit_type = #{visitType}, visit_time = #{visitTime}, status = #{status}, registration_fee = #{registrationFee}, diagnosis_fee = #{diagnosisFee}, operator = #{operator}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
